questions.clue: As co-editor of the influential magazine The Smart Set, this Baltimorean attacked the "booboisie"

The difference engine, a computing device he designed in the 1820s, was built in 1991 from his plans & it worked!

final.clue: Citing John Winthrop, who said, "The eyes of all people are on us", Ronald Reagan liked to compare the U.S. to this
final.answer: a shining city on a hill
